prestazioni: YD25DDTi (2.5L turbo-diesel) engine remap via **ECU Master EMU Black** standalone ECU with custom fueling maps optimized for **Garrett GT2260VK turbocharger** (hybrid compressor wheel, 0.63 A/R turbine housing) and **Sachs Performance twin-disc clutch (360mm, 6-puck)** for 400Nm+ torque handling
**Nismo 3-inch stainless steel downpipe** with **Scorpion 3.5-inch cat-back exhaust** (mandrel-bent, 1.2mm wall thickness) and **Bosch LSU 4.9 wideband O2 sensors** for closed-loop AFR monitoring

**KW Suspensions Clubsport coilovers (3-way adjustable, 80mm strut bodies)** with **SuperPro polyurethane bushings (front control arms, subframe, diff mounts)** and **Nismo 24mm rear anti-roll bar** for reduced body roll during high-speed desert dune runs
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (D40-specific, carbon fiber fenders, 50mm extended flares)** with **custom PPF matte vinyl wrap (3M 2080 Gloss Thunderstorm Grey)** and **debadged grille (replaced with laser-cut aluminum NISSAN script)**
**OEM+ LED headlight retrofit (Morimoto XB LED projectors, Hella 55W bi-xenon HID low beams, Osram Night Breaker Laser high beams)** with **custom C-shaped DRLs (Lux H8 LED strips, smoked lenses)**

**Nismo R35 GT-R-style rear diffuser (carbon fiber, 3-inch fins, integrated **Titanium Racing Development 4-inch exhaust tips**)** paired with **Voltex Type-3 rear wing (carbon fiber, 1200mm span, adjustable angle)** for downforce at 120+ km/h
